world.name: Classic High Fantasy
world.story_notes: CHARACTER BACKSTORY — Lucan: Lucan is a weary soul of thirty-four, bearing the angular grace of his elven heritage softened by the rugged, scruffy build of his human father, all topped with a crown of perpetually unkempt, silver-streaked dark hair. His most arresting feature is his heterochromia; his sea-green eye reflects the present, while his cloudy, pale blue "sight" eye constantly flickers toward the shifting threads of the future. Clad in practical, ink-stained robes of deep blue and silver, he is never without his worn tarokka cards or a smooth obsidian orb, artifacts of a man who has traded his youth for the burden of foresight. Cast out from a prestigious academy for sabotaging an experiment to prevent a disaster only he could see, he now drifts as a cynical, detached investigator for hire. Haunted by a recurring vision of an encroaching shadow, Lucan tracks the party not out of altruism, but from a desperate, calculated necessity to ensure their survival, for he knows their fates are inextricably woven into the future of the realm.

party.name: Lucan

inventory.name: Spellbook (6 chosen spells + Mage Armor + Magic Missile)

npcs.name: Elara
npcs.notes: A scout who seems unnerved by Lucan's foresight. She is investigating the notice board.

history_log.event: Lucan created. Wizard Level 1. Adventure begins.
